displayName.description: Marketplace Name, that will be displayed in VTEX Mapper.

categoryTreeEndPoint.description: Endpoint that returns categories and attributes according to VTEX  Mapper specifications.

mappingEndPoint.description: Secure endpoint that will receive the category mapping sent by VTEX Mapper.

allowsRemap.description: Allows rempaping categories in case the marketplace or seller tree is altered. If marked as `true`, all trees will be remapped.

CategoryTreeProcessingNotificationEndpoi.description: The `CategoryTreeProcessingNotificationEndpoint` is optional, and should be an endpoint from the external marketplace, that will be notified after the marketplace's category tree is successfully processed or not.
